title: com.para.identity.grant
summary: Consent grant record representing a citizen's approval for a third party to access specific identity data or perform actions on their behalf.
relationships: Grants are created by the identity owner and approved explicitly via m8.
Revoked grants remain in the ledger for audit but are marked inactive.
constraints: Scope must be a known grant scope registered in the m8 grants registry.
Recipient must be a valid DID or registered application identifier.

fields.name: scope
fields.description: Grant scope defining what data or action is being authorized.

fields.name: recipient
fields.description: DID or application identifier of the party receiving the grant.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Grant lifecycle state: pending, approved, revoked, expired.

fields.name: expiresAt
fields.description: Optional expiration timestamp after which the grant is invalid.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the grant was originally created.
